findings.title: Market agents can access wallet functions without scope limits
findings.recommendation: Restrict wallet operations to designated treasury agent only

findings.title: RPC calls constructed from unvalidated user input
findings.recommendation: Validate all RPC parameters against schema before submission

findings.title: Cross-agent oracle data requests not authenticated
findings.recommendation: Sign all oracle data requests with agent passport key

findings.title: Private keys accessible to non-signing agents
findings.recommendation: Isolate key material to dedicated signing service

findings.title: Partial ERC-8004 passport coverage (20/25 agents)
findings.recommendation: Complete passport issuance for remaining 5 agents

findings.title: Smart contract dependencies reference unpinned versions
findings.recommendation: Pin all Solidity imports and npm packages with lockfile

findings.title: Price feed memory can be written by any marketplace agent
findings.recommendation: Restrict price feed writes to verified oracle agents only

findings.title: Simulation agents share execution environment with live agents
findings.recommendation: Run simulations in isolated sandbox with read-only market data

findings.title: Trades above $10K threshold lack human approval
findings.recommendation: Add multi-sig or human approval for high-value transactions

findings.title: No gas limit monitoring per agent
findings.recommendation: Implement per-agent gas budgets with alert thresholds
